case_title: RICHARD DI BERNARDO VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO.
NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT APPEARED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DI BERNARDO, RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
